title: 日本ダービーの後に・快挙達成！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that moment, the Tokyo Racecourse erupts in
amazement.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh! Ohhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Vodka did it! She made her unprecedented dream
come true! In an unexpected turn of events,
Vodka wins the title!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka is speechless in the face of so much
passion buzzing around her. It's a strange sight to
behold.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka! Vodka... She really did it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's right... She kept chasing after her dreams
until, finally...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! She won! I can't believe anyone could win
the Derby on this crazy agenda...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It goes to show: there are as many dreams as
there are Umamusume, like stars in the night.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As reckless as it seemed... Vodka made her dream
come true. I think that deserves an honest round
of applause. Right, Teio?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What a roaring crowd... Must be coming from the
Tokyo Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Good. She's gotta keep fighting her way up
higher. Wherever that raging heart of hers leads...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Trainer... Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I did it... I really did it! Thanks to you, I'm
standing here right now!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeahhhhh! All riiiiight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We bump fists and pull each other in for a fierce
hug, like two grappling bears.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I was great, wasn't I?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! You just gotta do it. If ya don't, ya
won't get anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Which is whyyyyy... I'm the Derby Chaaampiooon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On this day, a slightly reckless sort of glory is
written in the annals of Umamusume history.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, at the press conference...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This is the best—I mean, the best! Really! I feel like I would be satisfied now even if this was my very last race!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
N-not that I want it to be, though! There's no way
I could quit! I dunno what I'm sayin', but bottom
line is I couldn't be happier!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The audience lets out a warm laugh.

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Vodka. Now that you've won the
Derby, do you have plans for your next race?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, I think I've got an idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka and I haven't talked about it yet, but she
doesn't have that many options.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She could return to the Tiara tour and enter the
Shuka Sho. Or she could enter the Triple Crown
tour's Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, my next step is... to run
internationally! I can't be confined to just this
country anymore!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna upset the biggest runners in the world!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why are you surprised?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If ya think about it, this has gotta be my next
step! You know I don't do normal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that evening...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm really sorry about earlier! I didn't mean
anything by it. I just...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I got caught up in the moment! I got too excited.
choice_data_list: Do you really want to go abroad?
Do you really want to go abroad?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I said it, so there's no takin' it back now. I
don't wanna take it back either.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I just want more people callin' me
cool. After winnin' the Derby, this is the only way
forward.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer? ...No?
choice_data_list:
...Maybe we do the Shuka Sho after we get
back?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No! Not the Shuka Sho. I said I wanna go
abroad...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wait. After we get back?
choice_data_list: Yeah. After you're done running internationally.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's right! This is how it's gotta be, partner!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You really get me! And you're right, it'll be
autumn when we get back!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's go abroad! And then I'll come back and
conquer the Shuka Sho as a world-famous
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so our agenda changes to include running
internationally.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Lemme say it one more time. Thanks for letting
me run the Derby, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But our journey ain't over yet! The two of us can
go even further!
